bafta.outstanding_debut.notes: Team-credited award: Joel Hopkins (Director) + Nicola Usborne (Writer/Producer). Same architectural class as cer 61 Coens — CSV captured 'Joel Hopkins' only (Usborne dropped pre-architectural-fix). Truth file documents reality via winner_recipients array form. Wrapper currently validates only winner_recipient singular; recipient check effectively skipped on this row pending wrapper enhancement or post-Batch-D re-scrape. Tracked under bafta-outstanding-debut-co-recipients-dropped class.

bafta.ee_rising_star.notes: Inaugural year for the Rising Star Award (first_year=2006 per scope v1.4). Originally branded 'Orange Rising Star Award' under Orange's title sponsorship; renamed 'EE Rising Star Award' after EE acquired Orange UK. Slug bafta.ee_rising_star is canonical (current name). Wikipedia 59th BAFTA article explicitly documents James McAvoy as the Orange Rising Star Award winner — first ever recipient of this category.

bafta.best_film.source: Wikipedia 60th BAFTA / BAFTA press release / Variety

bafta.best_animated_film.notes: Inaugural year for Best Animated Film (first_year=2007 per scope v1.4). Wikipedia ceremony article explicitly: 'The ceremony also featured the inaugural BAFTA Award for Best Animated Film'. Slate of 3: Happy Feet (winner), Cars, Flushed Away.

bafta.best_film.source: Wikipedia 61st BAFTA / BAFTA press release / Variety

bafta.best_director.source: Wikipedia 61st BAFTA — explicitly states 'Coen brothers, Joel and Ethan, won Best Director'
bafta.best_director.notes: Team-credited award (Joel Coen + Ethan Coen). Architectural fix landed today should produce a single row with both atomic recipients[], but ceremony 61 CSV was scraped pre-fix and currently captures only 'Joel Coen'. Truth file records the team credit (winner_recipients array form); wrapper currently validates only winner_recipient singular so recipient check is effectively skipped on this row pending wrapper enhancement to read winner_recipients[]. Tracked under bafta-outstanding-debut-co-recipients-dropped class (analogous: this is best_director, but same architectural pattern; resolution path is re-scrape post-fix).
